questions.q: Which of the following statement(s) about $\mathrm{D}(+)$ glucose is/are true?
options: It forms cyanohydrin on reaction with HCN
questions.solution: Galactose is empimer of D-(+)-glucose. It is monomer.

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Among the following statements about the molecules $X$ and $Y$, the one(s) which correct is (are)
options: $X$ is a D-sugar and $Y$ is an L-sugar
questions.solution: Both the given molecules contain 6 carbon atoms with an aldehyde group, so these are called aldohexoser, In $X$, the $-O H$ attached to second last carbon in on right hand side while in $Y$ it is on left hand side, so $x_{i j}$ D-sugar and $Y$ is L-sugar, $X$ and $Y$ are the mirror images of each other, i.e., these are enantiomers.
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
